Class TrainingController

java.lang.Object
ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TrainingController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/v1/training") public class TrainingController extends Object
REST controller for training document and certification management.

Provides endpoints for managing training materials and policies, including document upload and download, quiz management, acknowledgements, practical sign-offs, and certification tracking.

Used by both employees (reading and completing training) and managers/admins (uploading documents, signing off practical training, reviewing team progress).

Base path: /api/v1/training

  • Constructor Details

    • TrainingController

      public TrainingController()

  • Method Details

    • getPolicies

      @GetMapping("/policies") public List<TrainingDocument> getPolicies()
      Returns all policy documents available in the system.
      Returns:
      a list of TrainingDocument entries of type POLICY

    • getMaterials

      @GetMapping("/materials") public List<TrainingDocument> getMaterials()
      Returns all training material documents available in the system.
      Returns:
      a list of TrainingDocument entries of type TRAINING

    • getMyTrainingStatuses

      @GetMapping("/statuses/me") public List<TrainingStatusResponse> getMyTrainingStatuses()
      Returns the training completion statuses for the currently authenticated user.
      Returns:
      a list of TrainingStatusResponse objects for the current user

    • getMyCertifications

      @GetMapping("/certifications/me") public List<Certification> getMyCertifications()
      Returns certifications earned by the currently authenticated user.
      Returns:
      a list of Certification objects for the current user

    • getTeamCertifications

      @GetMapping("/certifications/team") public List<Certification> getTeamCertifications()
      Returns certifications for all members of the current organization. Intended for use by managers and administrators.
      Returns:
      a list of Certification objects for the organization

    • getMyAcknowledgements

      @GetMapping("/acknowledgements/me") public List<DocumentAcknowledgement> getMyAcknowledgements()
      Returns all document acknowledgements made by the currently authenticated user.
      Returns:
      a list of DocumentAcknowledgement objects for the current user

    • getTeamAcknowledgements

      @GetMapping("/acknowledgements/team") public List<DocumentAcknowledgement> getTeamAcknowledgements()
      Returns all document acknowledgements across the current organization. Intended for use by managers and administrators.
      Returns:
      a list of DocumentAcknowledgement objects for the organization

    • getOrganizationEmployees

      @GetMapping("/employees") public List<EmployeeOptionResponse> getOrganizationEmployees()
      Returns a list of employees in the current organization. Used for selecting employees in practical training sign-off forms.
      Returns:
      a list of EmployeeOptionResponse objects

    • createDocument

      @PostMapping("/documents") public TrainingDocument createDocument(@RequestBody TrainingDocument document)
      Creates a new training document using metadata only (no file upload).
      Parameters:
      document - the training document entity containing title, type, and completion type
      Returns:
      the saved TrainingDocument

    • uploadDocument

      @PostMapping("/documents/upload") public TrainingDocument uploadDocument(@RequestParam("file") org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file, @RequestParam("title") String title, @RequestParam("description") String description, @RequestParam(value="content",required=false) String content, @RequestParam("type") TrainingDocumentType type, @RequestParam("completionType") TrainingCompletionType completionType) throws Exception
      Uploads a training document as a file (multipart/form-data).
      Parameters:
      file - the file to upload (PDF, TXT, etc.)
      title - the display title of the document
      description - a description of the document's content
      content - optional text content of the document
      type - the document type (POLICY or TRAINING)
      completionType - how completion is tracked (QUIZ, ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, or PRACTICAL)
      Returns:
      the saved TrainingDocument
      Throws:
      Exception - if the file cannot be stored

    • downloadFile

      @GetMapping("/documents/{id}/file") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<org.springframework.core.io.Resource> downloadFile(@PathVariable Long id) throws Exception
      Downloads the file associated with a training document. Serves the file inline with appropriate content type (PDF or plain text).
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the training document
      Returns:
      the file as a Resource with appropriate content headers
      Throws:
      Exception - if the file cannot be found or read

    • getQuizQuestions

      @GetMapping("/{documentId}/quiz") public List<TrainingQuizQuestion> getQuizQuestions(@PathVariable Long documentId)
      Returns the quiz questions for a specific training document.
      Parameters:
      documentId - the ID of the training document
      Returns:
      a list of TrainingQuizQuestion objects

    • addQuizQuestion

      @PostMapping("/{documentId}/quiz/questions") public TrainingQuizQuestion addQuizQuestion(@PathVariable Long documentId, @RequestBody CreateQuizQuestionRequest request)
      Adds a new quiz question to a training document. Intended for use by managers and administrators.
      Parameters:
      documentId - the ID of the training document to add the question to
      request - the quiz question data including question text, options, and correct answer
      Returns:
      the saved TrainingQuizQuestion

    • submitQuiz

      @PostMapping("/{documentId}/quiz/submit") public TrainingQuizResultResponse submitQuiz(@PathVariable Long documentId, @RequestBody QuizSubmissionRequest request)
      Submits quiz answers for a training document and returns the result.
      Parameters:
      documentId - the ID of the training document being assessed
      request - the submission containing the user's selected answers
      Returns:
      a TrainingQuizResultResponse indicating pass/fail and score

    • acknowledgeDocument

      @PostMapping("/{documentId}/acknowledge") public void acknowledgeDocument(@PathVariable Long documentId)
      Records that the currently authenticated user has acknowledged a training document.
      Parameters:
      documentId - the ID of the document to acknowledge

    • approvePracticalTraining

      @PostMapping("/{documentId}/practical-signoff") public void approvePracticalTraining(@PathVariable Long documentId, @RequestBody PracticalSignOffRequest request)
      Records a practical training sign-off for a specific employee. Intended for use by managers and administrators.
      Parameters:
      documentId - the ID of the training document the sign-off relates to
      request - the sign-off data including the employee ID and optional notes
